name: Peakstone Realty Trust
summary: PART I The use herein of the words PKST, the Company, Peakstone, we, us, and our refer to Peakstone Realty Trust, a Maryland real estate investment trust, and its subsidiaries, including PKST OP L.P., our operating partnership (our Operating Partnership), except where the context otherwise requires. Overview Peakstone Realty Trust (NYSE: PKST) is an industrial real estate investment trust (REIT), with a strategic focus on growth in the industrial outdoor storage (IOS) sector.
